articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: Asia markets mostly fall as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment - CNBC
articles.description: Most Asia-Pacific markets traded lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.
articles.content:
Asia-Pacific markets mostly fell Friday, as cautious optimism over the Middle East conflict tempered sentiment, diverging from Wall Street's record-setting rally.
